aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Lashbrook Mechanical due to a lack of structured data and conversational content, but there is potential for improvement with targeted optimizations.
quick_wins: Create an FAQ section with questions relevant to HVAC services

critical_issues: No engagement in the Q&A section

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms
Regularly monitor citations for any discrepancies

agency_pitch.solution: Implement schema markup, develop FAQ content, and optimize GBP to ensure AI models recognize and recommend Lashbrook Mechanical as the go-to HVAC expert.
